message:
fix(sync): extend waiter ID wrapping to pool register_waiter, update inventory test assertions

- pool.rs: apply wrapping_add(1) to register_waiter() next_waiter_id
  increment, completing the overflow-prevention fix across all sync
  primitives (mutex, rwlock, mpsc, once_cell, and now pool)
- tokio_ecosystem_capability_inventory.rs: update quic/http3 boundary
  wiring assertions to match the new native feature surface layout —
  quic-compat is now gated with not(feature="quic") and the native
  quic/http3 features use inline module blocks instead of mod re-exports

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
